snippet.title: Warner Bros. CEO David Zaslav Talks Freedom of Speech & Independent Media in Poland and Beyond
snippet.description:
In this insightful interview, Warner Bros. Discovery President and CEO David Zaslav discusses the significance of free speech and independent media, with a focus on Poland's influence and impact. Zaslav shares his personal connection to the country and highlights how Warner Bros. Discovery strives to uphold the values of freedom of speech and journalistic integrity. Dive into this engaging conversation to learn about the company's commitment to fostering independent media in Poland and around the world.
#poland #warnerbrosdiscovery #Zaslav #tvnnews

snippet.title: David Zaslav, Warner Bros. Discovery C.E.O., on Hollywood’s Challenges | DealBook Summit 2023
snippet.description:
Often cast as an adversary to those on strike in Hollywood, David Zaslav, the C.E.O. of Warner Bros. Discovery, defends job cuts he made after taking the top job at the company last year, negotiations with striking members of the actors’ union and the Writers Guild of America and the company’s programming. 

This interview was with Andrew Ross Sorkin of The New York Times at the annual DealBook Summit, recorded live in front of an audience at Jazz at Lincoln Center. Read more about highlights from the day at http://www.nytimes.com/2023/11/29/dealbook-summit-news

snippet.title: CNN corporate head David Zaslav takes ‘full responsibility’ for disastrous Chris Licht tenure
snippet.description:
CNN’s corporate head, David Zaslav, spoke to network staff at its New York headquarters Wednesday and took “full responsibility” for outgoing CEO Chris Licht’s disastrous tenure.

The Warner Bros. Discovery CEO, who hired Licht — who had never been a success as the executive producer of several shows, but was untested at the top of an entire network — praised Licht’s past successes. But he said, “Like all of you, he was in the line of fire and he’s taken a lot of hits.”

“For a number of reasons, things didn’t work and that’s unfortunate and ultimately that’s on me. And I take full responsibility for that,” Zaslav said.

He added, “But now we begin a new page.”

Read more at https://pagesix.com/2023/06/07/cnn-corporate-head-david-zaslav-takes-full-responsibility-for-disastrous-chris-licht-tenure/

#cnn #chrislicht #davidzaslav #media

snippet.title: Warner Bros CEO David Zaslav Booed at BU Commencement
snippet.description:
'Pay your writers!' — Graduating Boston University students chanted and booed Warner Bros. Discovery CEO David Zaslav as he attempted to deliver their commencement address over the weekend. The incident occurred as the WGA writers strike entered its third week.

Discovery Ceo David Zaslavs Lifeline To Paramounts Shari Redstone Not Enough Amid Merger Talk - New York Post | Warner Bros Discovery Ceo David Zaslav Extends Lifeline To Paramount's Shari Redstone In Potential Merger: A Desperate Attempt To Navigate Uncertain Times In The Media Industry

snippet.title: Who Is David Zaslav?
snippet.description:
From 'Honey Boo Boo' to Hollywood's most enigmatic figure — David Zaslav's career trajectory raises eyebrows. His shift from obscurity to industry powerhouse is a saga of ambition and controversy. #WhoIs 
» Subscribe to @NowThisOriginals

In this episode of Who Is we discover the intriguing journey of David Zaslav, a figure who traversed from creating iconic reality TV shows like 'Here Comes Honey Boo Boo' to becoming a polarizing character in Hollywood. But who is David Zaslav and how did Zaslav transition from his humble origins to a position of power, overseeing major networks and studios?

Graduating from David Zaslav, Boston University's School of Law in 1985, he initially ventured into a law firm in New York and later transitioned into a junior lawyer role for a CNBC forerunner. Zaslav's ascent within the industry stemmed from his dedication, often staying late at the office and fostering influential relationships. By 2004, he had climbed to the helm of NBCUniversal's cable distribution and syndication. Transitioning to Discovery CEO David Zaslav in 2007 marked the onset of his metamorphosis into a controversial figure in the entertainment sphere.

Implementing substantial layoffs and refocusing operations on lucrative reality TV content like 'Here Comes Honey Boo Boo,' 'Sex Sent Me to the ER,' and 'My Big Fat Fabulous Life,' Zaslav's decisions fueled both profitability and criticism. While societal values in programming shifted, Zaslav's earnings skyrocketed, culminating in a staggering $250 million pay package in 2021 alone.

Amidst the streaming platform dominance, Discovery acquisitions expanded, seizing control of CNN, HBO, and Warner Bros., elevating Zaslav to a heavyweight studio executive. However, his choices faced scrutiny; reports hinted at 'Batgirl' cancelled for potential tax advantages and the removal of original HBO series to watch like 'Westworld' for tax write-offs.

The industry tension climaxed during a Writers Guild Strike, where Zaslav faced backlash at a Boston University commencement speech. His Cannes Film Festival celebration, juxtaposed against the struggles of writers, added fuel to the controversy. David Zaslav booed, David Zaslav pay your writers.

As the spotlight dims, agreements between Writers Guild Strike 2023, SAG, and studios signal a return to normalcy. Can Zaslav pivot his antagonistic narrative and emerge as a protagonist in this riveting Hollywood saga?

snippet.title: David Zaslav Brought in Peter Jackson to Embarrass Amazon's Rings of Power | Lord of the Rings | WBD
snippet.description:
David Zaslav Brought in Peter Jackson to Embarrass Amazon's Rings of Power | Lord of the Rings | WBD

While Amazon does the best it can with buckets of money and the rights to Tolkien's tweets left in drafts, David Zaslav reminded Jeff Bezos and the Rings of Power crew that he's got the real goods: The rights to the Lord of the Rings AND a contract with Peter Jackson.

@ValliantRenegade @MelonieMacGoBoom, @WDW_Pro  and @FatStevenJFG discuss the one true trilogy to rule them all and how it's going to wipe the floor with Rings of Power.
